# Skill: Leader Health Loop

When the user asks for health-loop features, load this skill.

## What this skill knows
- The 6-week loop metrics: weight (weekly), energy 1–5 at 15:00, sleep ok yes/no.
- Workouts: Strength A, Strength B, Walk 20–30 minutes.
- Status thresholds: green >=80%, yellow 50–79%, red <50% adherence.

## How to respond
- Prefer minimal UI steps and simple data model.
- Always propose small PR-sized increments.
- Provide tests for calculations.
